\noindent We set up a new \ttblue{mus\_obj} and use a
materiality of \ttblue{pm = 36730} to arrive at a
sample size of 1100.

\par\addvspace{\topsep}
\begingroup
\fvset{listparameters={%
  \setlength{\topsep}{0pt}%

\begin{Verbatim}[breaklines=true,formatcom=\color{ada_blue}]
multiple = mus_sample(
  bv=accounts_receivable["amount"],
  id=accounts_receivable["invoice"],
  pm=36730,
).size()
multiple.n

[1] 1100
